items.title: Former Newcastle ace Miguel Almiron becomes first World Cup star sent off for breaking new Fifa rule against Turkey
items.summary: MIGUEL ALMIRON became the first ever player to be sent off... for COVERING HIS MOUTH. Almiron, 32, was in action for Paraguay in a crucial World Cup clash with Turkey at the Levi's Stadium in San Francisco. But the winger didn't spend much time on the pitch as he was sent off in the first...

items.title: Brazil 3 Haiti 0: Man Utd star Cunha justifies first World Cup start with brilliant double and even better celebration
items.summary: IN THE city of independence, Matheus Cunha proved Carlo Ancelotti can place his dependence on him.  The debate around Brazil’s No9 has raged for years. Since Ronaldo’s reign, Luis Fabiano, Fred, Gabriel Jesus and Richarlison have carried the heavy weight of the shirt at World Cups.  This t

items.summary: Groupings and tee times for the third round of the 126th US Open, held at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club in Southampton, New York.

items.title: Cunha scores twice as Brazil beat Haiti
items.summary: Manchester United forward Matheus Cunha scores twice as Brazil comfortably beat Haiti - who become the first team to be eliminated from the 2026 World Cup.

items.title: Cunha strikes twice as Brazil earn comfortable win over Haiti
items.summary: Matheus Cunha kick-started Brazil’s World Cup campaign by scoring twice in a comfortable 3-0 victory over Haiti in Group C.

items.title: Brazil sweep into form as Cunha’s quickfire double sparks World Cup win over Haiti
items.summary: Matheus Cunha scored twice as Brazil moved top of World Cup Group C with a 3-0 win over Haiti. Vinícius Júnior netted the third, with all of the goals coming in a first half during which Brazil looked markedly improved from their insipid opening draw against Morocco .
